Listing text

App name (title.txt) 12 / 30
PMP Exam Pro
Short description 68 / 80
PMP exam prep with interactive lessons, quizzes & progress tracking.
Full description 1304 / 4000
Prepare for your PMP certification exam with PMP Exam Pro — a structured, lesson-based study app designed to help you master project management concepts. Structured Learning Path Follow a guided curriculum covering all key PMP exam domains: People, Process, and Business Environment. Each lesson builds on the previous one so you learn in a logical sequence. Interactive Question Types Practice with varied question formats including single-select, multi-select, drag-and-drop, and text-input questions. Each lesson includes a quiz to test your understanding. Track Your Progress Monitor your learning with a scoring system, streak tracking, and lesson completion status. See how far you've come and what's left to study. Topics Covered • What is Project Management • The Project Manager's Role • Project Stakeholders • Project Life Cycles • Predictive, Adaptive & Hybrid Approaches • And more lessons added regularly Key Features • Bite-sized lessons (8–10 minutes each) • Points and scoring for each lesson • Daily streak to keep you motivated • Dark mode support • Works offline — study anywhere Whether you're just starting your PMP journey or doing a final review before the exam, PMP Exam Pro gives you the focused practice you need to pass with confidence.
What's new (changelog) 257 / 500
What's new in 1.1.0: • Refreshed onboarding — clearer prompts and larger, easier-to-tap domain cards • Smoother navigation — leaving a lesson now returns you to Home • Visual polish across Home, lessons, and onboarding • Bug fixes and stability improvements
⚠️ First App Store release (no public version yet — only v1.0.0 b1 in TestFlight). Build 1.1.0, wire real StoreKit products + prod RevenueCat key, sign Paid-Apps agreement, complete App Privacy + reviewer demo account. See docs/release/apple-appstore-publish-checklist.md.

Master the PMP exam with bite-sized lessons, interactive quizzes, and progress tracking across all three exam domains. Study anywhere — it works offline.
Description 1269 / 4000
Prepare for your PMP certification exam with PMP Exam Pro — a structured, lesson-based study app designed to help you master project management concepts. STRUCTURED LEARNING PATH Follow a guided curriculum covering all key PMP exam domains: People, Process, and Business Environment. Each lesson builds on the previous one so you learn in a logical sequence. INTERACTIVE QUESTION TYPES Practice with varied question formats including single-select, multi-select, drag-and-drop, and text-input questions. Each lesson includes a quiz to test your understanding. TRACK YOUR PROGRESS Monitor your learning with a scoring system, streak tracking, and lesson completion status. See how far you've come and what's left to study. TOPICS COVERED • What is Project Management • The Project Manager's Role • Project Stakeholders • Project Life Cycles • Predictive, Adaptive & Hybrid Approaches • And more lessons added regularly KEY FEATURES • Bite-sized lessons (8–10 minutes each) • Points and scoring for each lesson • Daily streak to keep you motivated • Dark mode support • Works offline — study anywhere Whether you're just starting your PMP journey or doing a final review before the exam, PMP Exam Pro gives you the focused practice you need to pass with confidence.
